text:
Resources for Doula Providers | Contra Costa Health
Contra Costa Health Plan (CCHP) thanks you for serving and improving the health of our community. Below you will find resources that we hope will strengthen our partnership and support you and your services.
Doula Provider Manual
Our
Doula Provider Manual
gives you information on billing, claims, contracting, member resources, and more.
Prenatal Brochure
This
comprehensive resource guide lists all services and programs available to CCHP members experiencing pregnancy. You may use this as a resource guide to connect your clients with services in Contra Costa County or share directly with them. Available in
English
,
Spanish
, and
Traditional Chinese
with additional languages upon request.
Health Education Member Resource Guide
The
Health Education Member Resource Guide
shows you various resources in Contra Costa County that are available to CCHP members.
Doula Office Hours
CCHP holds regular Office Hours to discuss various topics related to working with CCHP and offer contracted and prospective doulas the opportunity to have their questions answered. Below you will find some of our previously recorded office hours sessions.
Note: If you would like to be added to our doula mailing list, where you will receive doula-related updates like our office hours sessions, please email
healtheducation@cchealth.org
. If you are a contracted provider, you are already on the list.
April 7, 2025 - Appeals, Grievances and Disputes
Feb. 14, 2025 - Claims
Oct. 23, 2024
